decontamination_notes: Original scenario authored for VulcanBench on 2026-06-01; not derived from any public repository, issue, or dataset, so it post-dates all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: arrays_replaced
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^arrays are replaced, not merged element-by-element$' tests/merge.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: no_mutation
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^does not mutate the target object$' tests/merge.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: no_proto_pollution
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^a __proto__ payload does not pollute Object.prototype$' tests/merge.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: adds_new_keys
pass_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^new keys from source are added$' tests/merge.test.ts
